name: Italian Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE/FILLING
Cake: Cream the butter and sugar until light. Add eggs one at a time. Stir in the remaining ingredients. Pour into a buttered and floured 9 x 5 inch loaf pan. Bake at 325°F for 1-1/4 to 1 1/2 hours or until done. Let cool in the pan for 5 minutes before turning onto a rack. Slice horizontally into three sections.
Filling: Combine the first four ingredients in a blender until smooth. Fold in grated chocolate or strawberries. Spread evenly between layers.
Frosting: Melt the chocolate and coffee over very low heat. Beat in the butter a small amount at a time. Continue beating until thick and of spreading consistency. Frost the cake and garnish.
